sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ أَخُو الْمُسْلِمِ يُسَاعِدُهُ وَيَنْصَحُهُ بِالْخَيْرِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman je muslimanu brat, pomaže mu i savjetuje ga u dobru.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim is the brother of a Muslim; he helps him and advises him toward good.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «الْمُؤْمِنُ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ كَالْبُنْيَانِ، يَشُدُّ بَعْضُهُ بَعْضًا» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الصَّلَاةِ، رَقْم ٤٨١].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Vjernik je vjerniku poput građevine, jedan drugog podupiru' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o namazu, br. 481].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'A believer to another believer is like a building, they support one another' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Prayer, No. 481].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ يُعَلِّمُنَا أَهَمِّيَّةَ التَّعَاوُنِ وَالْوَحْدَةِ بَيْنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis nas uči važnosti saradnje i jedinstva među muslimanima.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith teaches us the importance of cooperation and unity among Muslims.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجُوزُ لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَظْلِمَ أَخَاهُ أَوْ يَتْرُكَهُ وَحِيدًا فِي الشِّدَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimanu nije dozvoljeno da nepravdu čini svome bratu niti da ga ostavi samog u teškoći.
sentences.translationEn: It is not permissible for a Muslim to wrong his brother or leave him alone in hardship.

sentences.arabic: الْمُجْتَمَعُ الْقَوِيُّ هُوَ الَّذِي يَتَرَاحَمُ فِيهِ النَّاسُ.
sentences.translation: Jako društvo je ono u kojem su ljudi milostivi jedni prema drugima.
sentences.translationEn: A strong society is one where people are merciful to one another.
